name: upload_file
description: Upload a file to Dropbox at a specified path. This endpoint supports files up to 150 MB. The file content goes in the request body, and the path and write mode are specified via a special Dropbox-API-Arg header as JSON.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path in the user's Dropbox where the file should be written (e.g., '/Documents/report.pdf').

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Write conflict strategy: 'add' (never overwrite), 'overwrite' (always overwrite), or 'update' (overwrite if rev matches).

parameters.name: autorename
parameters.description: If true, Dropbox will rename the file if there is a conflict (e.g., 'report (1).pdf').

parameters.name: mute
parameters.description: If true, the upload will not trigger desktop notifications for the user.
